---
id: metadata-quality-remediation-diagram
title: Metadata Quality Remediation Workflow Diagram
owner: governance-steward
status: DRAFT
aspirational: true
---

# UIAO Metadata Quality Remediation Workflow Diagram

## Visual Flow from Drift Detection to SLA Resolution

---

## Mermaid Diagram

[DIAGRAM-01: Top-down decision-flowchart diagram with a central diamond branch. Top: "Drift Detected" → "Owner Acknowledgment" → "Metadata Review" → diamond decision box "Type of Drift?". Five outgoing branches fan downward from the diamond, each labeled with the drift type: Structural → "Fix Required Fields"; Referential → "Fix IDs and References"; Ownership → "Update Owner Metadata"; Semantic → "Correct Status/Classification"; Automation → "Escalate to Maintainers". The first four fixes converge into "Local Validation", and the Automation branch flows into "Automation Patch" then also converges. Local Validation flows down to "Open Remediation PR" → "CI Validator". CI Validator has a green Pass arrow to "Merge + Resolve" and a red Fail arrow looping back up to "Metadata Review". Merge + Resolve flows down to "Dashboard Update" → "Governance Verification" → "Close SLA" (terminal). Engineering blueprint style, diamond branch in amber, drift-type branches color-coded, federal navy primary boxes, 16:9 landscape.]

---

## ASCII Diagram

```
Drift --> Acknowledge --> Review --> Classify
         |-> Structural --> Fix fields
         |-> Referential --> Fix IDs/refs
         |-> Ownership --> Update owner
         |-> Semantic --> Correct status
         |-> Automation --> Escalate

Fix --> Validate --> Remediation PR --> CI --> Merge --> Dashboard --> Governance --> Close SLA
```

> **SSOT Reference:** See /ssot/UIAO-SSOT.md
